title: Chedworth Roman Villa (short trip, Peter's birthday)

main_route.excerpt: We have driven quite a tortuous route over the Heads of the Valleys – new roads being built, & stopped for lunch at Raglan Castle.
Tuesday May 25th Peter's Birthday 11.10. We left for a short trip to see Chadworth Roman Villa

summary: A short birthday trip for Peter (turning 11 on 25 May 2021), travelling from Birmingham via a tortuous route over the Heads of the Valleys with a lunch stop at Raglan Castle on Monday, then visiting Chedworth Roman Villa in Gloucestershire on Tuesday. The diary notes that during lunch at Chedworth they learned that Kaz and John were expecting their second baby.
extraction_notes: Page B_0345_L has mixed_start=true: the top of the page continues a previous Wales trip (horses on Llanmador beach, Gower, St Davids police incident). This trip's content begins at the 'Monday' heading. The diary spells the villa 'Chadworth' throughout; the correct modern name is Chedworth. No overnight base is named for Monday night — marked as unresolved. Travellers not explicitly listed; Peter is named (birthday), and the text uses 'we' throughout suggesting at least Simon and/or Eve present. 'Tuesday May 25th' confirms 2021-05-25 (Peter's 11th birthday per '11.10' notation).
